record.field: <data> <!-- Step 1: remove time — now only ONE appointment_date remains (the date field) --> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='appointment_date'][@widget='time']" position="replace"/> <!-- Step 2: remove healthprof --> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='healthprof']" position="replace"/> <!-- Step 3: remove checked_in button (was at position 1, blocking healthprof from being first) --> <xpath expr="/tree/button[@name='checked_in']" position="replace"/> <!-- Step 4: insert healthprof before the now-unique appointment_date (=date field) --> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='appointment_date']" position="before"> <field name="healthprof" expand="1" width="300"/> </xpath> <!-- Step 5: insert time right after appointment_date (=date) — still unique at this point --> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='appointment_date']" position="after"> <field name="appointment_date" string="Time" widget="time"/> </xpath> <!-- Step 6: put checked_in button back before patient --> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='patient']" position="before"> <button name="checked_in" help="The patient has arrived and is waiting" string="Checked in"/> </xpath> </data>
